name: Chart
description: A comprehensive charting component built on Recharts, providing LineChart, AreaChart, BarChart, PieChart, RadarChart, and CohortChart components with consistent styling and configuration.
usage_guidelines: Use appropriate chart type for your data visualization needs.
Wrap charts in ChartContainer for responsive sizing.
Provide data as array of objects with consistent keys.
Customize axes with xAxisConfig and yAxisConfig.
Use ChartTooltipContent and ChartLegendContent for consistent styling.
Configure chart spacing with chartHorizontalSpace and chartVerticalSpace.

data.description: Array of data objects to visualize.

width.description: Chart width (number for pixels, string for percentage).

tooltipContentConfig.description: Configuration for ChartTooltipContent component (hideLabel, hideIndicator, nameFormatter, valueFormatter, labelClassName).

LineChart.description: Line chart for trends over time

styling_info.visual_description: Responsive charts with consistent color schemes, tooltips, and legends. Supports light/dark themes. Smooth animations on data changes.

Do: Choose appropriate chart type for data
Before using rechart, please check if the chart component able to fullfil the requirement
Dont: Don't use too many data points (causes performance issues)
Don't use pie charts for many categories
Don't forget to handle empty data
Don't make charts too small to read
